title: iseilema convexum
intro: Iseilema convexum, also known as Iseilema, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It is commonly found in tropical and subtropical regions of Africa and Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is known to have antibacterial, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which can help to treat various health conditions such as wounds, fever, and digestive issues. The herbal preparation of Iseilema can be made into a decoction, infusion, or powder, and is often used to treat respiratory issues, skin conditions, and gastrointestinal problems.
